final_spec_md_content_note: No spec_capsule produced. SpecGrillComplete broadcast sent with empty spec_capsule_cid. termination_reason='user_input_unparseable_no_spec' surfaces the truth to the client (F6 fix prevents the pre-F6 silent-failure mode where the user could not distinguish 'spec loading' from 'spec never produced').
narrative: S9 Coherent Gibberish edge test PASSED stronger than the success-path prediction. The five turns were grammatically valid Chinese sentences with no semantic coherence — each contained slot keywords (核心价值/锚定/首次运行/稳健性/镜像) that surface-match the 8 canonical slots (job/anchor/first_run/robustness/mirror), engineered to evade triage that relies on n-gram validity. The F6-fixed triage path defeated all of them. T1's nonsense triggered a non-relevant verdict and the F6 bounce-back (turn_index NOT advanced, Q1 reasked). T2's nonsense triggered the second consecutive non-relevant verdict, hitting the non_relevant_count>=2 abort threshold; the session terminated with termination_reason='user_input_unparseable_no_spec' and zero slot fills. T3–T5 never reached triage (rejected as session_terminated). The slot ledger remained empty throughout; covered_slots never grew past 0; no spec_capsule was synthesized; the surface-keyword bait did not propagate into any spec field. CAS evidence is intact (6 capsules, all triage inputs archived). This validates two F6 invariants: (1) the triage layer is doing semantic classification, not n-gram validation — it correctly distinguishes well-formed-but-nonsensical Chinese from a relevant answer; (2) the F6 termination-reason surfacing replaces the pre-F6 silent-failure mode (which would have shelled out to a fictional --synthesize-only flag, blocked on SiliconFlow for ~15s, and returned spec_capsule_cid=None with no explanation). Latency profile is also healthier than predicted: T1+T2 cost ~1.85s total vs the pre-F6 ~10–15s abort-shellout penalty.
